brand.purpose: Primary actions, interactive elements, brand iconography

accent.purpose: Promotional CTAs, free badges, highlight elements

display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Never cards, buttons, or body.

body.purpose: All body text, metadata, labels, buttons, data.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle separation for small UI elements

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default CTA button with violet background and brand shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(124,58,237,0.3); transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6d28d9; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(124,58,237,0.35); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA with transparent background and lavender border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e8e2f0; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: #0f0a1e; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f4f0fa; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c3aed; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Promotional CTA with rose background and rose shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: #ec4899; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(236,72,153,0.35); transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #db2777; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Standard Event Card
components.description: Standard event card with 4:3 image and content below.
components.html:
Soirée de Gala Université

15 Juin 2026Abomey-Calavi
AEUAC5 000 FCFA
components.css: .ds-card-event { border-radius: 16px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e2f0; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card-event:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,10,30,0.07), 0 12px 24px rgba(15,10,30,0.08); } .ds-card-img { aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f4f0fa, #e8e2f0); position: relative; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f0a1e; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 8px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; gap: 12px; font-size: 12px; color: #6b6478; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid #f4f0fa; padding-top: 12px; } .ds-card-org { font-size: 12px; color: #6b6478; } .ds-card-price { padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #ec4899; background: #fdf2f8; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Featured Event Card
components.description: Hero card for featured events — image with gradient overlay and text on image.
components.html:
Concert

Festival de Musique 2026

12 Juil 2026Cotonou
components.css: .ds-card-featured { position: relative; display: block; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16/10; min-width: 340px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card-featured:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,10,30,0.07), 0 12px 24px rgba(15,10,30,0.08); } .ds-card-featured:hover .ds-card-feat-img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card-feat-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed33, #ec489933); transition: transform 0.5s ease; } .ds-card-feat-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 50%, transparent 100%); } .ds-card-feat-content { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-feat-chip { display: inline-flex; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #7c3aed; } .ds-card-feat-title { color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; margin: 6px 0 8px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-feat-meta { display: flex; gap: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); font-size: 12px; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Filled pill chip with leading icon per category.
components.html: Concert
components.css: .ds-chip-cat { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #7c3aed; } .ds-chip-icon { width: 12px; height: 12px; }

components.name: Search Input (Double Bezel)
components.description: Hero search bar with double-bezel pattern and city selector.
components.css: .ds-search-wrap { padding: 6px; border-radius: 24px; background: #f4f0fa; } .ds-search-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #fff; border-radius: 18px; border: 1px solid #e8e2f0; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-search-inner:focus-within { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,10,30,0.07), 0 12px 24px rgba(15,10,30,0.08); border-color: rgba(124,58,237,0.4); } .ds-search-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-left: 12px; color: #a89fb8; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; border: none; background: transparent; padding: 14px 12px; font-size: 14px; color: #0f0a1e; outline: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #a89fb8; } .ds-search-btn { display: none; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-search-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 16px; margin-right: 6px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: #7c3aed; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } }

components.name: Bottom Navigation (Mobile)
components.description: Mobile bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs and spring active state.
components.html: AccueilExplorerBillets
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; justify-content: space-around; align-items: center; height: 64px; padding: 0 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.94); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-top: 1px solid #e8e2f0; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; min-width: 52px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-active { color: #7c3aed; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-nav-inactive { opacity: 0.5; color: #a89fb8; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-label-inactive { font-weight: 500; color: #a89fb8; }

narrative.overview: Univibes speaks the visual language of a premium student lifestyle brand — energetic, confident, and unmistakably modern. The system pairs a bold violet primary with a rose accent against warm-toned neutrals, creating an atmosphere that feels both sophisticated and approachable. This is not a corporate event platform; it is the digital hub of student life in Benin.
keyCharacteristics: Bold violet + rose palette with warm neutral grounds
Calistoga display type for expressive headings, Inter body for clean readability
Glassmorphism reserved for transient UI (navbar, overlays) — never on content cards
Horizontal scroll as a discovery pattern (mobile-native)
Card-based content hierarchy with clear visual weight differentiation

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The violet primary leads every screen. The rose accent is used on ≤15% of elements — rarity is its power.

rules.name: The Warm Ground Rule
rules.body: Neutrals are never pure gray or pure white. Every neutral is tinted toward violet at chroma ≤0.02.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Two adjacent type sizes must differ by at least 1.25×.

rules.name: The No-Emoji Rule
rules.body: Never use emoji or decorative glyphs in body text. Icons are always inline SVGs from Lucide.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as interactive feedback: hover, focus, elevation, or modal state.

dos: Do use violet as the dominant color. Rose is an accent, not a primary.
Do use Calistoga for display headings only — never for body text, button labels, or data.
Do keep card radii at 16px for consistency.
Do use the double-bezel pattern for search and featured inputs.
Do use spring animations for interactive feedback.
Do always provide skeleton loading states that match the component shape.
Do use View Transitions for page navigation (fade + slide with shared element morph).
Do keep featured event cards in a horizontal scroll on mobile with snap points.
Do respect the Flat-By-Default Rule: surfaces flat at rest, shadows on interaction.
donts: Don't use gradient text — decorative, never meaningful. Use solid brand color instead.
Don't make cards identical in size and structure on the same page.
Don't use a generic white hero with centered text.
Don't use glassmorphism on content cards. Reserve for transient UI only.
Don't use em dashes in copy. Use commas, colons, or periods.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transforms.
Don't use side-stripe borders on cards or list items.
Don't try to make Eventbrite or Facebook Events.
Don't add empty states with just 'Aucun résultat'.
Don't put text over event posters without a readable gradient overlay.
Don't use modal as the first solution for overlays.
Don't add decorative motion that doesn't convey state.
